sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108700" key="u(polhsmosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπολησμοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n108700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forgetfulness, Srpska Kraljevska Akademija, Spomenik</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg002:71:312" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71.312</biblScope> </bibl> (Požarevatz).</sense> </entryFree>
